title: Obsidian Glass
description: This mod adds a obsidian glass from Minetest. Also i'm add a obsidian glass pane. You can craft from 8 obsidian block and glass for obsidian glass block, or glass pane for obsidian glass pane
body: This mod adds a obsidian glass from Minetest. Also i'm add a obsidian glass pane. You can craft from 8 obsidian block and glass for obsidian glass block, or glass pane for obsidian glass pane
